text.content:
This service is unlocked once Chef's Kiss has been completed. It takes place on the Afterlife's second floor, and is maintained by the Techtopia Tastemaker (or his replacement).

Cost

1 meal (which will keep any character fed for 1 full day) costs 1 Eagle.

Function

The player partaking immediately gains the benefits of eating at the Fresh Food lifestyle. If you're playing food benefits RAW, then they can immediately gain the following, instead:

  • Once in the next 24 hours, they can choose to gain +2 to a check of their choice

  • For the next 24 hours, they gain +1 to a stat of their choice.

  • For the next 24 hours, they gain +2 to a skill of their choice.

Editor's note: it's recommended that either the player or the GM create an active effect on their character sheet to track these changes, so they can be easily disabled once time is up.
